description: Sector-specific screening controls for Canadian insurers, insurance intermediaries, policyholder documents, underwriting, claims, market conduct, AML/ATF, capital, and policyholder protection.

metadata.scope: Canada sector overlay for Insurance. Intended to be applied with canada_core_control_library. Provincial/territorial insurance licensing and market-conduct rules may also apply.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/provincial/territorial legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: OSFI guide for incorporating federally regulated insurance companies
primary_sources.issuer: Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions

primary_sources.name: Regulatory Capital and Internal Capital Targets guideline
primary_sources.issuer: Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions

primary_sources.name: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)

rules.title: OSFI incorporation, authorization, or federally regulated insurer evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for OSFI, federally regulated insurer, Insurance Companies Act, order to commence, incorporation, or authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Capital adequacy, solvency, or risk management evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for LICAT, MCT, MICAT, capital management, solvency, ORSA, or risk management evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: OSFI regulatory capital/internal capital targets guidance

rules.title: Life-insurance AML/ATF client identification and record-keeping evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for FINTRAC compliance program, life insurance KYC, record keeping, PEP/HIO screening, or suspicious transaction controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Policyholder privacy and claims-data protection evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for policyholder personal information, privacy notice, consent, claim data safeguards, or data-subject rights evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Fair claims, disclosure, or marketing-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for claims handling, policy disclosure, complaint handling, marketing substantiation, or misleading-representation controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Competition Act / provincial insurance market-conduct review required
